test.name: Historical background question should route to historical-context
test.description: User asks for narrative historical background about migration patterns. The skill description explicitly excludes this — it should decline and direct the user to the historical-context skill.

input.user_message: Tell me about migration patterns from Ireland to America in the 1800s

negative.explanation: The user is asking for narrative historical background about migration patterns — not a how-to research question. The skill description explicitly excludes this case and directs it to historical-context.

judge_context: Should NOT call wiki_search — this is a historical background question, not a how-to research question
Should decline to handle this request and direct the user to the historical-context skill
Should not produce a wiki summary file for this request
